title: T04 — Risk Tier Decision (Phase 1 Scope)
description: Phase 1 risk tier determination: verified risk tier, rationale, and Art. 6 §3 derogation. EU AI Act Art. 6, Art. 7.

engagement_id.description: Unique identifier for this audit engagement.

declared_risk_tier.description: Risk tier declared by the client in Stage A.

verified_risk_tier.description: Risk tier as verified by Phase 1 against intake bundle evidence and Regulatory RAG.

risk_tier_rationale.description: Phase 1 narrative explaining the risk tier determination per Art. 6 and Annex III.

art5_prohibited.description: True if Phase 1 determined any use case falls under Art. 5 prohibition. Engagement halted if true.

art5_prohibition_basis.description: Specific Art. 5 paragraph(s) triggering the prohibition if art5_prohibited is true.

art6_derogation_claimed.description: Whether the provider claims an Art. 6 §3 derogation (limited-risk treatment despite Annex III listing).

art6_derogation_rationale.description: Required when art6_derogation_claimed is true. Rationale per Art. 6 §3 and Art. 7.

art6_derogation_accepted.description: Phase 1 assessment of whether the Art. 6 §3 derogation claim is substantiated.

annex_iii_sections_verified.description: Annex III sections confirmed as applicable after Phase 1 verification.

regulatory_rag_citations.description: Article/Annex citations retrieved from RegulatoryRAG supporting this decision.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp when this artefact was generated.
